mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, principal_id, principal_type, action, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, status, error_code, detail_ext, create_time FROM dc3_identity_audit_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND (#{principalId} IS NULL OR #{principalId} = 0 OR principal_id = #{principalId}) AND (#{action} IS NULL OR #{action} = '' OR action = #{action}) AND (#{resourceType} IS NULL OR #{resourceType} = '' OR resource_type = #{resourceType}) AND (#{resourceId} IS NULL OR #{resourceId} = 0 OR resource_id = #{resourceId}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR status = #{status}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
